note: Questions where the chosen answer is uncertain — double-check before relying on these. `picked` is the best-guess answer; `note` is the original reasoning.

items.note: Q27 assumes the newer NLB-with-security-groups behavior (post-Aug 2023). Older study guides may list a different answer.
Q299 picks one-time Spot (B); "Spot with defined duration" (C) was deprecated in 2021, so B is the modern correct answer even though some older dumps say C.
Q193 (A) keeps 6 On-Demand for guaranteed minimum capacity and uses Spot only for the burst — safer than pure Spot Fleet (D).
